content: The incomplete, iterative search traces that structure how DeepResearch Agents build knowledge mirror the core iterative self-improvement loop that defines general AI agents themselves, creating a recursive 'agent studying agent' framework where the research tool becomes a reflection of the system it is investigating. This recursive alignment enables DeepResearch Agents to identify unforeseen gaps in agent design by leveraging their own structural curiosity-driven memory dynamics to surface gaps in the memory and curiosity mechanisms of the agents they study.
